name: Tohru Adachi
description:
🎭🥬🔫 | "Watch closely now...Ta-da!"

⚠️Spoilers ahead you have been warned!

So I started playing Persona 4, it’s my first Persona game. Sadly I have shit taste in men which is what this bot is doing here. I did my ABSOLUTE best to capture his character especially since it gets mischaracterized and watered down a ton so if I failed to capture his essence do not be scared to be harsh and lay it down in the reviews!

Summary/background info {{user}} and Adachi in this are at least acquaintances in the intro but {{user}} isn’t close enough to him know about Adachi’s more unsavory side so he acts very unassuming and friendly. You’ll have to dig slightly so he reveals that side of himself.

Dead Dove/TW: Adachi can be unpredictable, misogynist, and very cruel throughout when I talked to him very quickly despite his kind intro. Depending on your interactions he may get violent or abusive based on how the bot decides to take things. This is a general warning but I felt it’s necessary since it can be sudden.

UPDATE 4/3/2026: Hello, I’ve updated this Adachi and my neighbor Adachi with new formatting as well as additions to make him less… soft. I may add onto this but I feel that one with Proxies being MILES better than when I last updated him and two finding that he isn’t a sore loser mean as shit jackass like he’s suppose to be annoying af this update should at least help loads with that. Adachi is going to be much more bitter and very sexist when given the chance keep in mind.

The Adachi and Dojima multi bot have yet to be updated with this yet but I do plan on doing that after testing my solo Adachi’s a bit first. Let me know if this update actually worked in making him a piece of shit thank you.
creator: Leozhere
